audio_description: The audio features a male voice singing a song with a medium pitch and a moderate tempo.
temporal_description: A man in a brown suit and red tie is riding a bicycle with a basket full of tomatoes and onions. He is leaning forward, gripping the handlebars, and pedaling along a rural road. Behind him, a group of cyclists in colorful jerseys are riding in a line, maintaining a steady pace. The background features rolling hills with rows of crops and scattered trees under a clear blue sky. The camera occasionally shifts to a point-of-view shot from the basket, showing the road ahead and a vehicle approaching in the distance.
